nasb.text: Thus the Jews struck all their enemies with the sword, killing and destroying; and they did what they pleased to those who hated them.

esv.text: The Jews struck all their enemies with the sword, killing and destroying them, and did as they pleased to those who hated them.

cnv.text: 這樣，猶大人擊殺他們所有的仇敵，他們用刀盡量擊殺，隨意對待他們的仇人。

ccb.text: 犹太人用刀击杀所有敌人，任意消灭恨他们的人。
